program_name: Англійська та німецька мови й зарубіжна література в закладах освіти
decision_basis: possibleSolution=1 (accredit); accreditationDecision=5. EG concluded programme is viable and effectively realised. No substantive deficiencies identified; minor recommendations concern qualification procedures, academic mobility, syllabi navigation.
key_finding: This two-language programme (English primary, German additional) passed accreditation with no balance remarks on credit distribution between the two language subjects. As in the sister programme 12171, the EG described the content blocks as 'well balanced' and found no disproportionality requiring correction — the asymmetric dual-language structure was implicitly accepted.
